name: ai-code-review-platform
description: Production-Ready AI Code Review Platform built on React 19, Express, MongoDB, Redis, and Gemini API

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server

author: Roshan Singh
